canonical_definition: A large-scale benchmark (>500K texts) for evaluating machine-generated text detection and authorship attribution, featuring diverse OLLMs and challenging tasks including out-of-domain texts, unseen models, and human-machine mixing.

definitions.text: A large-scale benchmark (>500K texts) for evaluating machine-generated text detection and authorship attribution, featuring diverse OLLMs and challenging tasks including out-of-domain texts, unseen models, and human-machine mixing.

relationships.evidence: We prompted each LLM to generate a news article given a headline.

characterization: A large-scale benchmark (>500K texts) for evaluating machine-generated text detection and authorship attribution, featuring diverse OLLMs and challenging tasks including out-of-domain texts, unseen models, and human-machine mixing.
